name: Priya — Organized Barcelona Traveler (Booking Regression)

ux_issues.description: In restaurant recommendation (Step 12), the AI called create_itinerary_items three times with identical items. The duplicate dedup correctly returned 'already_exists' on the 2nd and 3rd calls, but the AI's final response contained repeated text blocks confirming the same restaurants multiple times. This is a stutter/repetition issue in the tool loop.
ux_issues.evidence: AI called create_itinerary_items 3 times with the same 4 restaurant items. Response contained 3 paragraphs of nearly identical confirmation text.

ux_issues.description: Activity booking was ingested with BOOKING_TYPE_ACTIVITY but the AI parser reclassified it to BOOKING_TYPE_TOUR. While semantically valid (Sagrada Familia tour), the type returned does not match the type requested. This could confuse frontend filtering.
ux_issues.evidence: Requested booking_type: BOOKING_TYPE_ACTIVITY, returned type: BOOKING_TYPE_TOUR

steps.name: Selection mode — create_trip
steps.details: create_trip triggered correctly. Trip created: 'Barcelona Trip' (4c80c949-8e24-4376-8dcc-5e8c90944470), status=TRIP_STATUS_PLANNING, destination=ES

steps.name: IngestBooking — flight
steps.details: Flight ingested: DL7829X, Delta Air Lines, JFK→BCN, seat 27F, passenger MARTINEZ/ELENA MS. All structured fields extracted correctly (flightDetails populated).

steps.name: IngestBooking — hotel
steps.details: Hotel ingested: HAB-2026-9831, Hotel Arts Barcelona, Superior Room City View, check-in 2026-06-15, check-out 2026-06-20, 2 guests. hotelDetails fully populated.

steps.name: IngestBooking — activity
steps.details: Activity ingested: SF-44921, GetYourGuide, Sagrada Familia tour. tourDetails populated (meeting point, operator, date, time). Note: type returned as BOOKING_TYPE_TOUR instead of requested BOOKING_TYPE_ACTIVITY.

steps.name: ListBookings
steps.details: 3 bookings returned with correct types (FLIGHT, HOTEL, TOUR), correct confirmation codes, and correct providers.

steps.name: GetBooking — all three
steps.details: All three bookings returned complete structured data including flightDetails, hotelDetails, and tourDetails sub-objects.

steps.name: ExtractBookingField — flight terminal/departure
steps.details: Correct answer: JFK Terminal 4, 6:45 PM EDT on June 15, 2026. Extracted fields include departure_terminal, departure_time, flight_number.

steps.name: ExtractBookingField — hotel cancellation policy
steps.details: Correct answer: Free cancellation until June 12, 2026 (11:59 PM CEST). Late cancellation = EUR 289.00 (first night). No-show = full stay. All policy details accurately extracted.

steps.name: ExtractBookingField — activity meeting point
steps.details: Correct answer: Nativity Facade entrance (Carrer de la Marina side), C/ de la Marina 253, 08013 Barcelona. Guide holding orange 'Barcelona Expert Tours' sign. Arrive 15 minutes early.

steps.name: Planning — day trip recommendation (recommend_booking)
steps.details: recommend_booking triggered with GetYourGuide partner link for Barcelona day trips (Montserrat, Girona, Dali Museum). FTC affiliate disclosure present in AI response: 'Affiliate disclosure: I may earn a small commission if you book through this link.' Also triggered suggest_expert (Jordi, Spain specialist) and create_itinerary_items (7 items across 5 days).

steps.name: Planning — restaurant suggestion (no recommend_booking)
steps.details: recommend_booking was correctly NOT triggered. AI recommended 4 authentic local restaurants (La Cova Fumada, El Xampanyet, Quimet & Quimet, Bar del Pla) and added them as meal itinerary items. No affiliate links in response. Minor stutter: tool called 3x with same items.

steps.name: Itinerary verification
steps.details: 5-day itinerary verified via GetItinerary: 11 total items across 5 days. Incorporates existing bookings (arrival/BCN, Hotel Arts check-in, Sagrada Familia tour on Day 3). Includes transport, accommodation, sightseeing, activities, and meals.

summary: All 13 test steps passed. The booking ingestion pipeline works excellently — all three booking types (flight, hotel, activity/tour) were parsed with correct structured fields. ExtractBookingField accurately answered natural language questions about each booking. The recommend_booking tool correctly triggered for bookable activities (day trips with transport/tickets) and correctly did NOT trigger for restaurant recommendations. FTC affiliate disclosure was present in all AI responses containing partner links. The AI proactively built a comprehensive 5-day itinerary incorporating existing bookings. Two minor P2 issues: (1) AI stutter on restaurant step — create_itinerary_items called 3x with identical items causing repeated confirmation text, (2) BOOKING_TYPE_ACTIVITY was reclassified to BOOKING_TYPE_TOUR by the AI parser.
